hero.badge: First 100 appointments free — no card required
hero.titleLead: Uponco is appointment booking software for your
hero.subtitle: Uponco lets you publish your services and locations, take bookings online or onsite across every branch, and send automatic reminders. Your digital bridge to your customers — set up in five minutes and let customers book in seconds.

features.heading: Everything you need to take bookings
features.subheading: One simple tool to connect your business with the people who matter most.

multiLocation.title: Multi-location
multiLocation.description: Manage bookings across every branch from a single, unified calendar.

multiService.title: Multi-service
multiService.description: Offer any number of services, each with its own duration and team.

individualGroup.title: Individual & group
individualGroup.description: Take one-on-one appointments or fill group sessions with ease.

onlineOnsite.title: Online or onsite
onlineOnsite.description: Host virtual meetings or in-person visits — your customers choose.

reminders.title: Automatic reminders
reminders.description: Cut no-shows with timely reminders sent to every customer.

onboarding.title: 5-minute onboarding
onboarding.description: Set up your locations, services and team and start taking bookings today.

google.heading: Works with your Google Calendar
google.subheading: Connect your Google account and Uponco adds every confirmed appointment straight to your calendar, with a Google Meet link created automatically for online bookings.

sync.title: Appointments on your calendar
sync.description: When a customer books, Uponco creates an event in the Google Calendar of the account you connected, so your existing schedule stays in one place.

meet.title: Automatic Google Meet links
meet.description: Online appointments get a Google Meet link generated with the event and shared with your customer in their confirmation.

control.title: You stay in control
control.description: Connecting Google is optional and Uponco only asks to manage calendar events. We never read your emails, contacts or files, and you can disconnect at any time from your settings.

google.dataNote: Uponco uses Google user data only to create and update these appointment events on your behalf. We do not sell it or use it for advertising. See our

footer.copyright: Uponco. Your digital bridge to your customers.
